title: Pre-insulated valves for fluid system
abstract: The present disclosure relates to pre-insulated valves (102, 144) for a fluid system, comprising valve body (104, 146) having lugs (128, 168). The valves (102, 144) comprises first insulating layer (134, 172) comprising an inner surface (136, 174) being adapted to cover an entire outer surface (132, 176) of the plurality of lugs (128, 168) and an entire outer surface (130, 170) of the valve body (104, 146) such that the first insulating layer (134, 172) is in close physical contact with the outer surface (130, 170) of the valve body (104, 146) including an outer surface (132, 176) of the plurality of lugs (128, 168). The valves (102, 144) comprises second insulating layer (138, 178) comprising an inner surface (140, 180) being adapted to be in close physical contact with an entire outer surface (137, 182) of the first insulating layer (134, 172).
claims:
Claims I CLAIM 1. A pre-insulated valve (102, 144) for a fluid system comprising: a valve body (104, 146) having a plurality of lugs (128, 168) on an outer surface (130, 170) of the valve body (104, 146), each lug of the plurality of lugs (128, 168) being adapted to accommodate a fastener member (120) for fastening the valve body (104, 146) with a flange member (108) of a fluid pipe (106), characterized by a first insulating layer (134, 172) made of a low density polymer, the first insulating layer (134, 172) comprising an inner surface (136, 174) being adapted to cover an entire outer surface (132, 176) of the plurality of lugs (128, 168) of the valve body (104, 146) and the entire outer surface (130, 170) of the valve body (104, 146) such that the first insulating layer (134, 172) is in close physical contact with the outer surface (130, 170) of the valve body (104, 146) including the outer surface (132, 176) of the plurality of lugs (128, 168), and a second insulating layer (138, 178) made of a high density polymer, the second insulating layer (138, 178) comprising an inner surface (140, 180) being adapted to be in close physical contact with an entire outer surface (137, 182) of the first insulating layer (134, 172). 2. A pre-insulated valve (188) for a fluid system comprising: a valve body (190) having a pair of flange members (192), each flange member (192) being provided with a plurality of threaded blind holes (194) for accommodating a fastener member for fastening the valve body (190) with a flange member of a fluid pipe, characterized by a first insulating layer (196) made of a low density polymer, the first insulating layer (196) comprising an inner surface (198) being adapted to cover an entire outer surface (200) of the pair of flange members (192) of the valve body (190) and an entire outer surface (202) of the valve body (190) such that the first insulating layer (196) is in close physical contact with the outer surface (202) of the valve body (190) including the outer surface (200) of the pair of flange members (192), and 

 a second insulating layer (204) made of a high density polymer, the second insulating layer (204) comprising an inner surface (206) being adapted to be in close physical contact with an entire outer surface (199) of the first insulating layer (196). 3. The pre-insulated valve (102, 144, 188) as claimed in any one of claims 1 and 2, wherein the first insulating layer (134, 172, 196) is made of poly-urethane foam material. 4. The pre-insulated valve (102, 144, 188) as claimed in any one of claims 1-3, wherein the first insulating layer (134, 172, 196) is having a density ranging from about 65 to 75 kg/m 3 , preferably 70 kg/m 3. 5. The pre-insulated valve (102, 144, 188) as claimed in any one of claims 1 and 2, wherein the second insulating layer (138, 178, 204) is made of high density polyethylene material. 6. The pre-insulated valve (102, 144, 188) as claimed in any one of claims 1-5, wherein the first insulating layer (134, 172, 196) has relatively larger thickness (Tl, T4) when compared with a thickness (T2, T5) of the second insulating layer (138, 178, 204). 7. The pre-insulated valve (102, 144, 188) as claimed in any one of claims 1-6, wherein a combined thickness (T3, T6) of the first insulating layer (134, 172, 196) and the second insulating layer (138, 178, 204) is such that a surface temperature of an outer surface (142, 184, 208) of the second insulating layer (138, 178, 204) is above a dew point to prevent condensation. 8. The pre-insulated valve (188) as claimed in claim 2, wherein the flange member of the pipe includes a plurality of through holes axially aligned with the blind holes (194) of the flange members (192) of the valve body (190). 9. The pre-insulated valve (188) as claimed in claim 2 or 8, wherein threaded portion of the plurality of fasteners is enclosed wholly inside the blind holes (194) of the flange 

 member (192) of the valve body (190) and the plurality of through holes of the flange member of the pipe. 10. The pre-insulated valve (102, 144, 188) as claimed in any one of claims 1-9 comprising an insulation (143) external to an assembly (100, 148, 186) of the pre insulated valve (102, 144, 188).
